Don’t Worry, Darling (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $45,309,403Details
International Box Office $42,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $87,609,403
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,203,727
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $973,037
Total $2,176,764
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A 1950s housewife living with her husband in a utopian experimental community begins to worry that his glamorous company may be hiding disturbing secrets.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,353,213 (42.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,113 opening theaters/4,121 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $51,462,529

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 19th, 2022 (Special Engagement) by Warner Bros., released as Don’t Worry, Darling (IMAX Live Experience)
September 23rd, 2022 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 20th, 2022 (Wide) (Germany)
September 21st, 2022 (Wide) (Italy)
September 21st, 2022 (Wide) (France)
September 22nd, 2022 (Wide) (Croatia)
September 22nd, 2022 (Wide), released as No te preocupes cariño (Mexico)
Video Release: October 25th, 2022 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for sexuality, violent content and language.
(Rating bulletin 2708 (cert #53486), 11/24/2021)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Black List Graduates, Directing Yourself
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): United States
Geographical setting: California
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Relationships Gone Wrong, Sexism, Surprise Twist, Virtual Reality
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Time period setting: 1950s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Vertigo Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
